name: Ms. Pabiben Rabari
story: The real empowerment is the ability to think and choose. Use maximum creativity in our work, match the potential in ourselves to fulfil our dreams and get self-respect and recognition.

quote: Build Value and the Valuation will Follow.
author: Mr. Bhavesh Kothari

name: Dr. Tarita Shankar
role: Founder, Indira Group of Institutes Pune
story: Successful leaders see the opportunities in every difficulty, rather than the difficulty in every opportunity.

quote: Women just know how to multitask, and this is exactly what leadership is about.
author: Ms. Shweta Shalini

name: Dr. Ushy Mohan Das
story: When your soul burns with purpose and passion, it's your duty to be burnt to ashes by it.

quote: Take decisions and then make them right.
author: Shri. Ratan Tata

name: Ms. Shabia Walia
role: Founder, Hyacinth Sustainable Solutions Pvt. Ltd
story: I am the writer of my life film and I choose to be the hero rather than the victim. Life is too short to live by someone else’s expectations of you.

quote: Success isn't about how much money you make. It's about the difference you make in people's lives.
author: Michelle Obama

name: Ms. Sharmila Divatia
role: Managing Director, Lac Vardaan Association, an NPO
story: I don’t know how to string the words “give” and “up” together. So you will find me bouncing from a supposed failure right back on the winners table in a short span of time.

quote: Done is better than perfect.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

name: Ms. Nabomita Mazumdar
role: Founder, Nabomita.com, President of India Awardee.
story: The humility to fail takes the fear out of it.

quote: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

name: Ms. Manisha Raisinghani
story: Think Big - Achieve your next 3 years plan in the next 12 months.

quote: Everyone who's ever taken a shower has an idea. It's the person who gets out of the shower, dries off and does something about it who makes a difference.
author: Nolan Bushnell

name: Ms. Reema Sanghavi
role: Managing Director, Maximus Mice and Media Solutions Pvt Ltd
story: Live to Inspire.

quote: Everything is figureoutable.
author: Marie Forleo

name: Ms. Jaya Vaidhyanathan
story: If you never failed, it means you did not set the bar high enough. Dream big enough so that you fail, and have the courage to aim higher next time.

quote: If you think you're too small to have an impact, try going to bed with a mosquito.
author: Anita Roddick

name: Ms. Tanul Mishra
story: Trust my team wholeheartedly. I strongly believe in empowering my team and enabling them to become leaders themselves. One doesn’t need to be a founder or a CEO to be a leader.

quote: Confidence and hard work are the best medicine to kill the disease called failure.
author: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw

name: Ms. Namrata Tatiya
story: The only thing that can help you win over all the evils is YOU. So make yourself the most valuable one as you have the power to achieve anything and everything. Just don’t stop.

quote: Don't you dare underestimate the power of your own instinct.
author: Barbara Corcoran

name: Ms. Neha Kanabar
role: Founder, Community Entrepreneur UNIMO Universe of Moms
story: If beautiful things happen inside you, beautiful things will happen outside you.

quote: Rock bottom became the solid foundation on which I rebuilt my life.
author: J.K. Rowling

name: Ms. Shridaa Raheja
story: No one can give you your goals. No one can dig for you. This is your journey.

quote: Leadership is hard to define, and good leadership even harder. But if you can get people to follow you to the ends of the earth, you are a great leader.
author: Indra Nooyi

name: Ms. Shikha Pandey
role: Entrepreneur, BECK Technology Ventures Pvt. Ltd
story: Don't be limited. Be a LIMITED Edition.

quote: Integrity is your biggest asset. Once you lose it, nothing else matters.
author: Zia Mody

name: Ms. Chandni Khan
story: जब दो कूड़ा बीनने वाले बच्चे ये सब कर सकते है, तो कोई भी कुछ भी कर सकता है, बस जरुरत है एक पहल की!

quote: InnoSuccess is not about having all the answers; it's about having the courage to keep learning.
author: Kirthiga Reddy

name: Dr. Sandhya Mayenkar
role: Founder, Skm Institute of Culinary Arts, Kini Supermarket, Skm Enterprises, Skm Asha Foundation
story: My story is very simple and I take pride in my work. The recognition I get is a morale booster for me as well as other small town women like me, who want to stand up on their own feet, rise out of their homes to build a better life.

quote: Vision without action is merely a dream. Action without vision just passes the time. Vision with action can change the world.
author: Sudha Murty

name: Ms. Namita Shah
story: If you don't fail enough, you aren't aiming high enough.

quote: There is no perfect time to start. If you believe in your idea, begin.
author: Falguni Nayar

name: Ms. Neety Gupta
role: Proprietor,Neety Buildcon / Healing vibes by Neety.
story: Count your blessings, pray each day. Surrender to God’s will, he is the best judge.

quote: Build a brand that solves a real problem, and customers will become your biggest advocates.
author: Ghazal Alagh

name: Ms. Vinika Chandwani
role: CEO, Vinrak Food Tech Pvt Ltd
story: Everyone will tell you to grow fast, acquire funding. I feel success is about building a sustainable business and working for something you believe in and love doing. Focus on building a brand which people can trust and never give up.

quote: Entrepreneurship is about persistence. Every setback teaches you something valuable.
author: Upasana Taku

name: Ms. Anubha Singhai
story: Always put your 100 percent in whatever you do.

quote: Never let society define the size of your dreams.
author: Richa Kar

name: Ms. Ivy Manohara
story: Dream Big. Work Hard. Be Patient.

quote: Success comes to those who have the courage to dream and the determination to achieve it.
author: Vandana Luthra

name: Ms. Suvarna Bhat
story: When your presence is strongly felt, your purpose is fairly met. Reach more to serve more. Innovation is serendipity. Success doesn’t necessarily come from breakthrough innovation, but from flawless execution. A great strategy alone won’t win a game or a battle, the win comes from how good and effective the implementation is.

quote: Innovation begins when you dare to question the ordinary.
author: Suchi Mukherjee

name: Dr. Megha Bhatt
story: Exposure Leads To Exploration and Exploration to Innovation.

quote: If you want to create change, start by solving one real problem at a time.
author: Aditi Gupta

name: Ms. Roli Pandey
role: Founder, Zucate Mind Solutions Pvt Ltd
story: The key to your true potential is within you, and you realize it when your status quo is challenged; entrepreneurship does exactly that.

quote: Don't wait for opportunities. Create them, own them, and make them count.
author: Apurva Purohit

name: Dr. Tejal Kanwar
story: Don’t merely own the idea, own the execution too and build on it.
